description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI that runs on every push and pull request. Use two ubuntu-latest jobs: one for the website and one for android. The website job checks out the repository, sets up Node.js 8.x, installs dependencies with yarn, builds the website, and deploys to gh-pages if the push is to the master branch. The android job checks out the repository, installs dependencies, sets up the android environment, and builds and tests the android project.
